content: We can reframe Self-Refine, the no-supervised-data iterative self-feedback framework for output improvement, into a base module that incorporates multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from current LLM self-reflection research, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that retains the core advantage of no additional training or external supervision. This hybrid framework fixes the key limitation of vanilla single-perspective Self-Refine, which can get stuck in repeated blind spots that the model cannot identify with only one line of iterative feedback.
